productDisplayName: Nike Men Overplay White Sports Shoes
description: Style Note Bag that hoop with this pair of nike Overplay VII shoes. Designed for basketball lovers, this shoe adds an urban flair to the classic sport shoe. Product Details Synthetic upper with mesh tongue and overlays at the ankle Perforations on the forefoot area for enhanced breathable comfort Synthetic Nike swoosh on both sides of the mid-foot Padded synthetic tongue and collar that has fabric lining for snug comfort with a central lace up system for a snug, customised Fit Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Solid rubber outsole with herringbone pattern for maximum traction and optimal performance TPU shank in the mid-foot for enhanced stability and ergonomic comfort to the inner arch Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in sunlight
